## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare for the 1pm Lovable meeting by aligning on content strategy and addressing client concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Project Documentation Issues**: Current client project documentation is inadequate, lacking essential information (transcripts, notes, context) and proper organization, jeopardizing client relationship](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - **Client Priorities**: Lovable wants attribution for templates, improved user experience, and to address churn for users with \<10 prompts (50% of credit spend is internal tools/SaaS in month 1, rising to 80% by month 4)
  - [**Team Process Failures**: Reactive operations, unclear responsibilities, and insufficient communication during stand-ups led to poor documentation, creating risk of client churn similar to past experiences](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [**Action Required**: Immediate improvements needed to properly document calls, synthesize client requirements, and deliver higher quality work before the upcoming meeting](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Topics

### Current Client Documentation Status

  - [Current Lovable project documentation is severely lacking: not updated in 8 days, missing kickoff transcript and meeting notes](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Marcel expressed frustration at poor quality ("super sloppy," "bare minimum," "copy and paste from perplexity")](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [No context from client conversations captured, making it impossible for team members to understand client priorities](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Missing core elements like writing guidelines that should be documented](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Project failing to meet internal quality standards despite Lovable being identified as a critical client](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Client Insights from Deep Dives

  - [Lovable team noted attribution for templates as key priority](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Sebastian (heading templates project) and Rachel both want to meet with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - Client knows users sending \<10 prompts are more likely to churn
  - [Analytics show internal tools and SaaS make up 50% of credit spend in month 1, rising to 80% by month 4](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - Alex (client) is sending raw prompts from users with \<10 prompts to help understand churn reasons
  - [SEO team meeting scheduled for next week based on recent deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### Team Process Issues

  - [Stand-ups not being used effectively to identify blockers or delegate work](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Reactive approach to project management instead of proactive planning](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Unclear ownership of responsibilities (e.g., who should document calls)](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Meeting heavy schedules (Marcel: "18 hours of external meetings last week") preventing meaningful work](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Pattern of poor documentation potentially contributing to client churn (e.g., Clark)](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Lack of communication on work being done leads to perception of low value ("if we don't communicate that we're doing the right things")](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

### Meeting Preparation Needs

  - [George will cancel other commitments to properly prepare for the 1pm Lovable meeting](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Immediate need to process call transcripts and synthesize client requirements](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Templates and content strategy documentation must be updated before meeting](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Action items and next steps need to be clearly defined](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Need to demonstrate significant progress to retain client confidence](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to cancel other commitments to focus on meeting preparation](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Marcel to spend time cleaning up the project documentation to make it usable](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Process call recordings and transcripts to extract key client requirements](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Define clear content strategy with specific deliverables and timelines](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Document comparison article plans and template priorities](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Establish clearer team responsibilities to prevent similar issues in future](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Improve stand-up process to identify blockers earlier](https://fathom.video/share/oLuH3Kxe3VYKU_-sZmg4L54QgGyhUYKD?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
